utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You know Joey , I could teach you to sail if you want .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I could teach you to sail if you want .
1_I could teach you to sail if you want .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah ! I have been sailing my whole life . When I was fifteen my dad bought me my own boat .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I have been sailing my whole life . When I was fifteen my dad bought me my own boat .
3_When I was fifteen my dad bought me my own boat .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: What ? ! What ? ! He was trying to cheer me up ! My pony was sick .
